title: Management Buyouts: Which of the following is a characteristic of a strong...
summary: Identify the characteristics of a strong LBO candidate including cash flow strength and market position.
prompt: Which of the following is a characteristic of a strong LBO candidate?

options.text: A strong LBO candidate typically has strong cash flow generation and a leading
A formal tender offer to shareholders

solution: A strong LBO candidate typically has strong cash flow generation and a leading market position, among other characteristics.
